svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 05 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 05: Task Measurement map and Early Adopter Scorecard.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 05 Reference Images
Four dimensions: Importance × Frequency × Performance × Price
Not just "is it painful?" but "is it worth doing?"
Source: Clayton Christensen's Jobs to be Done framework
Score: urgency × budget × access × stability × growth potential
Score segments by total, not by individual attribute.
• You are not looking for a market. You are looking for an entry point.
• Early adopter is not someone who likes new things —
it is someone who has the problem, the budget, and the authority to move
• ICP is not demographics. It is pain structure.
• In B2B, the customer is rarely one person — map the decision unit
Source: Clayton Christensen, Competing Against Luck
